concept_hook: A former Olympic gymnast who treats combat like a sport to be mastered, winning through precision, flexibility, and psychological pressure.
narrative_role: The technical virtuoso who proves human excellence can compete with supernatural threats
media_archetype_inspiration: Anime sports champion crossed with procedural perfectionist

concept_hook: A supernatural siren who weaponizes sound itself — her voice shatters minds and her songs rewrite enemy perceptions.
narrative_role: The supernatural seductress who fights through perception manipulation and sonic devastation
media_archetype_inspiration: Musical horror villain meets noir femme fatale

concept_hook: A primal huntress from the Australian outback who tracks prey with supernatural patience and strikes without mercy.
narrative_role: The grounded survivalist who represents human tenacity against supernatural opponents

concept_hook: A British necromancer who trades humanity for power, raising twisted constructs from the bodies of her defeats.
narrative_role: The dark mage whose power grows with every fighter she defeats
media_archetype_inspiration: Gothic horror necromancer with Victorian sensibilities

concept_hook: A Greek nature spirit awakened in modern times, who drains life force from living things to sustain her eternal youth.
narrative_role: The ancient predator who views modern fighters as sap to be harvested
media_archetype_inspiration: Classical nymph mythology meets modern eco-horror

concept_hook: A demon who feeds on emotional energy, appearing as the perfect lover before draining her prey dry.
narrative_role: The emotional vampire who makes opponents fall in love before destroying them
media_archetype_inspiration: Classic succubus mythology meets psychological horror

concept_hook: A Brazilian street fighter who uses capoeira fluidity and dirty tricks to overcome larger opponents.
narrative_role: The scrappy underdog who fights dirty and represents the street-level tier
media_archetype_inspiration: Street fighter video game character with capoeira aesthetics

concept_hook: A French fashion icon who uses her clothing as weapons — blades woven into gowns, poisons in perfumes, wires in accessories.
narrative_role: The sophisticated killer who makes murder look like high fashion
media_archetype_inspiration: Fashion villain from a Bond film meets couturier assassin
